import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL});// Add token to requests
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}if(typeof FormData!=='undefined'&&config.data instanceof FormData){delete config.headers['Content-Type'];}return config;});// Auth Services

export const subjectService={createSubject:data=>api.post('/subjects',data),getAllSubjects:()=>api.get('/subjects'),getSubjectById:id=>api.get("/subjects/".concat(id)),updateSubject:(id,data)=>api.put("/subjects/".concat(id),data),deleteSubject:id=>api.delete("/subjects/".concat(id)),createTopic:data=>api.post('/subjects/topics/create',data),getTopicsBySubject:subjectId=>api.get("/subjects/".concat(subjectId,"/topics")),updateTopic:(id,data)=>api.put("/subjects/topics/".concat(id),data),deleteTopic:id=>api.delete("/subjects/topics/".concat(id))};// Study Material Services

export const planService={createPlan:data=>api.post('/plans',data),getStudentPlans:()=>api.get('/plans'),getPlansByDateRange:(startDate,endDate)=>api.get('/plans/range',{params:{startDate,endDate}}),updatePlan:(id,data)=>api.put("/plans/".concat(id),data),completePlan:id=>api.patch("/plans/".concat(id,"/complete")),deletePlan:id=>api.delete("/plans/".concat(id)),getLearningProgress:()=>api.get('/plans/progress/summary')};// Question & Answer Services
export const questionService={createQuestion:data=>{if(typeof FormData!=='undefined'&&data instanceof FormData){return api.post('/questions',data);}return api.post('/questions',data);},getAllQuestions:filters=>api.get('/questions',{params:filters}),getQuestionById:id=>api.get("/questions/".concat(id)),updateQuestion:(id,data)=>api.put("/questions/".concat(id),data),deleteQuestion:id=>api.delete("/questions/".concat(id)),createAnswer:(questionId,data)=>api.post("/questions/".concat(questionId,"/answers"),data),updateAnswer:(id,data)=>api.put("/questions/answers/".concat(id),data),deleteAnswer:id=>api.delete("/questions/answers/".concat(id)),markAnswerHelpful:id=>api.patch("/questions/answers/".concat(id,"/helpful")),markAnswerAccepted:id=>api.patch("/questions/answers/".concat(id,"/accept"))};// MCQ Services
export const mcqService={getAllMCQs:params=>api.get('/mcq',{params}),createMCQ:data=>api.post('/mcq',data),getMCQsBySubject:subjectId=>api.get("/mcq/subject/".concat(subjectId)),getMCQsByTopic:topicId=>api.get("/mcq/topic/".concat(topicId)),getMCQById:function(id){let hideAnswers=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:true;return api.get("/mcq/".concat(id),{params:{hideAnswers}});},updateMCQ:(id,data)=>api.put("/mcq/".concat(id),data),deleteMCQ:id=>api.delete("/mcq/".concat(id)),submitMCQAnswer:(mcqId,data)=>api.post("/mcq/".concat(mcqId,"/submit"),data),getUserMCQAttempts:filters=>api.get('/mcq/attempts/my',{params:filters}),getQuizScore:params=>api.get('/mcq/score/summary',{params}),startMockExam:(subjectId,topicId)=>api.get('/mcq/exam/start',{params:{subjectId,topicId}}),submitMockExam:data=>api.post('/mcq/exam/submit',data),getMyMockExamAttempts:()=>api.get('/mcq/exam/attempts/my')};// Exam Services (Tutor creates 10-question exams, students attempt them)
export const examService={createExam:data=>api.post('/exams',data,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}}),getAllExams:params=>api.get('/exams',{params}),getExamById:id=>api.get("/exams/".concat(id)),getExamQuestions:id=>api.get("/exams/".concat(id,"/questions")),updateExam:(id,data)=>api.put("/exams/".concat(id),data,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}}),deleteExam:id=>api.delete("/exams/".concat(id)),submitExamAttempt:(examId,data)=>api.post("/exams/".concat(examId,"/submit"),data),getMyExamAttempts:()=>api.get('/exams/attempts/my')};// Appointment Services

getAvailableSessions:(subject,date)=>api.get('/appointments/sessions/available',{params:{subject,date}}),getSessionDetails:sessionId=>api.get("/appointments/sessions/".concat(sessionId)),bookSession:data=>api.post('/appointments/book',data),getStudentBookings:()=>api.get('/appointments/my/bookings'),cancelBooking:appointmentId=>api.patch("/appointments/bookings/".concat(appointmentId,"/cancel")),submitSessionFeedback:(appointmentId,data)=>api.patch("/appointments/bookings/".concat(appointmentId,"/feedback"),data),// Tutor endpoints
createTutorSession:data=>api.post('/appointments/sessions/create',data),getTutorSessions:()=>api.get('/appointments/tutor/sessions'),getTutorSessionDetails:sessionId=>api.get("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId)),updateTutorSession:(sessionId,data)=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId),data),rescheduleSession:(sessionId,data)=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId,"/reschedule"),data),completeSession:sessionId=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId,"/complete")),completeTutorSession:sessionId=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId,"/complete")),cancelTutorSession:sessionId=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId,"/cancel")),removeStudentFromSession:(sessionId,appointmentId)=>api.patch("/appointments/tutor/sessions/".concat(sessionId,"/remove/").concat(appointmentId))};export default api;
